arts.ttl: Aston Villa reject Arsenal bid for striker Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: The PA news agency understands Villa have turned the bid down and are unhappy at the timing.

arts.ttl: Watkins to Arsenal: A dream transfer or Arteta's desperate gamble?
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins dreams of playing for Arsenal and Mikel Arteta is trying to help him realise this ambition. Aston Villa, of course, rejected the approach as they are simultaneously locked in negotiations with Al-Nassr over their other elite striker - Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Where Arsenal v Man City will be won and lost
arts.sum: With Arsenal's right-sided central defender William Saliba likely to man-mark Erling Haaland, Timber must constantly be aware of Marmoush’s desire to make darting runs inside him. Man City's tactic worked against Chelsea, who encountered worrying 1v1s with Haaland throughout the final 70 minutes of that match; the Norwegian scored twice from those situations.

arts.ttl: Report: The advantage Tottenham actually have in race to sign 'special' £25m striker over Arsenal
Report: Arsenal get response from Aston Villa after shock bid made for England international
arts.sum: Arsenals’ hopes of landing Ollie Watkins this January transfer window have been dashed after Aston Villa knocked back their offer, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Daily Mail had broke the news that Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has been a long-time admirer of England international and the club has now made a move for the 29-year-old. arts.ttl: Sources: Villa reject Arsenal bid for Watkins
arts.sum: Aston Villa have rejected a formal offer from Arsenal for Ollie Watkins, sources have told ESPN.

arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores and updates as Liverpool look to progress with a perfect record, plus updates from Girona vs Arsenal and Aston Villa vs Celtic.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa ‘furious’ after what Arsenal have done with Ollie Watkins bid
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Aston Villa are ‘furious’ after Arsenal launched a bid for Ollie Watkins. The Gunners have been in pursuit of...

arts.ttl: Arsenal teenager Heaven on brink of Man Utd move
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Arsenal's teenage central defender Ayden Heaven.

arts.ttl: Lewis-Skelly ban overturned after Arsenal appeal
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Myles Lewis-Skelly's three-match ban - imposed for his red card at Wolves on Saturday - has been overturned after an appeal.
